scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('apps/web/.next/types',{recursive:true,force:true})" && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.railway:build:web: pnpm exec prisma generate && pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.railway:build:worker: pnpm exec prisma generate && pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter worker build
